alias_activity.claim_boundary: Compiler alias-activity evidence only: Program AD static alias-lattice reports are executed locally for bounded view, list, scalar-rebinding, object-attribute, loop-carried, branch-control, and mutation-version cases; this does not promote general compiler AD, isolated benchmark, provider, hardware, GPU, or performance claim.

claim_boundary: Compiler evidence boundary only: bounded native LLVM/JIT tests, current Enzyme/LLVM execution evidence, Program AD alias-activity lattice evidence, and the non-promotional compiler promotion batch are attached for reviewer triage; this artifact does not promote general compiler AD, isolated benchmarks, provider, hardware, GPU, or performance claim.

enzyme_mlir.claim_boundary: Bounded real Enzyme/LLVM reverse-mode AD execution: scalar, vector and 2x2/3x3 matrix C kernels differentiated by the installed Enzyme pass and run natively, with the toolchain gradient checked against the analytic reference within float64 tolerance; no Enzyme-JAX, arbitrary-program, provider, hardware or performance claim.

native_llvm_jit.prescribed_selector_observation: path-targeted positive pytest selector avoids path-name negation and selects the native LLVM/JIT evidence tests
